steps.label: Approve SSTP by Program Management Council

constraints.text: Ensure, for Category I project/programs, that the SSTP is approved by the governing Program Management Council (PMC)
Project managers shall

steps.label: Obtain concurrence from cognizant SMA managers

constraints.text: has concurrence by the cognizant SMA managers and the project's senior engineer

steps.label: Obtain concurrence from project senior engineer
Allocate resources to System Safety Manager

constraints.text: Ensure that the System Safety Manager and the prime contractor (for out-of-house projects) have the resources to implement the SSTP

steps.label: Allocate resources to prime contractor
Approve SSTP changes by Program Management Council

constraints.text: Ensure, for Category I project/programs, that changes to the SSTP are approved by the governing PMC
have concurrence by the Chief, Safety and Mission Assurance

steps.label: Obtain concurrence from Chief of Safety and Mission Assurance
steps.action_object: concurrence from Chief, Safety and Mission Assurance

steps.label: Coordinate SSTP with SEMP

constraints.text: When the SSTP is not an integral part of the SEMP, ensure the SSTP is coordinated with the SEMP for the integration of system safety activities with other system engineering technical processes

steps.label: Assign System Safety Manager

constraints.text: In coordination with the program/project manager, assign a System Safety Manager to have specific responsibility for the development and implementation of the SSTP
The Center SMA Director shall

steps.label: Verify System Safety Manager expertise in safety analysis
steps.action_object: System Safety Manager expertise in safety analysis

constraints.text: Ensure that the assigned System Safety Manager has demonstrated expertise in safety analysis

steps.label: Verify System Safety Manager expertise in probabilistic risk assessment
steps.action_object: System Safety Manager expertise in probabilistic risk assessment techniques

constraints.text: including, in the case of Category I and II projects, the application of probabilistic risk assessment techniques

steps.label: Fund personnel with project safety oversight responsibilities
steps.action_object: personnel with project safety oversight responsibilities

constraints.text: Ensure that all personnel with project safety oversight responsibilities are funded by other than direct project funding sources

steps.label: Develop SSTP during project formulation phase

constraints.text: Develop a SSTP during the project formulation phase
The assigned System Safety Manager shall

steps.label: Update SSTP throughout system life cycle

constraints.text: update the plan throughout the system life cycle

steps.label: Apply graded approach to scope of system safety technical processes
steps.action_object: graded approach to scope of system safety technical processes

constraints.text: The scope of system safety technical processes in the SSTP follows the graded approach specified in Tables 2.1 and 2.2

steps.label: Specify system safety modeling activities in SSTP

constraints.text: Ensure that the SSTP provides the specifics of the system safety modeling activities and their application to risk-informed decision making and safety monitoring throughout the project life cycle

steps.label: Document application of system safety modeling to risk-informed decision making
steps.action_object: application of system safety modeling to risk-informed decision making

steps.label: Document application of system safety modeling to safety monitoring
steps.action_object: application of system safety modeling to safety monitoring

steps.label: Establish objectives and scope of system safety tasks
steps.action_object: objectives and scope of system safety tasks

constraints.text: In consultation with the project managers, establish and document in the SSTP the objectives and scope of the system safety tasks and define applicable safety deliverables and performance measures

steps.label: Define applicable safety deliverables
Define performance measures
Document objectives and scope of system safety tasks in SSTP
steps.action_object: objectives and scope of system safety tasks

steps.label: Provide technical direction for system safety activities
steps.action_object: technical direction for system safety activities

constraints.text: Provide technical direction and manage implementation of system safety activities as specified in the SSTP

steps.label: Manage implementation of system safety activities
Integrate system safety engineering activities into system engineering processes
steps.action_object: system safety engineering activities into system engineering technical processes

constraints.text: Ensure that system safety engineering activities are integrated into system engineering technical processes

steps.label: Determine acceptability of residual risk

constraints.text: Determine the acceptability of residual risk stemming from safety assessments

steps.label: Integrate specific safety requirements into programmatic requirements
steps.action_object: specific safety requirements into overall programmatic requirements

constraints.text: Ensure that specific safety requirements are integrated into overall programmatic requirements

steps.label: Reflect safety requirements in program and planning documents
steps.action_object: safety requirements in applicable program and planning documents

constraints.text: are reflected in applicable program and planning documents including the statement of work for contractor designs

steps.label: Include safety requirements in contractor statement of work
steps.action_object: safety requirements in statement of work for contractor designs

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in program design

constraints.text: Maintain appropriate safety participation in the program design, tests, operations, failures and mishaps, and contractor system safety activities at a level consistent with mishap potential for the life of the program

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in tests and operations
steps.action_object: safety participation in tests and operations

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in failures and mishaps
steps.action_object: safety participation in failures and mishaps

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in contractor system safety activities
steps.action_object: safety participation in contractor system safety activities

steps.label: Establish independent safety reporting channel

constraints.text: Establish an independent safety reporting channel to keep the Center SMA Director apprised of the system safety status (including tests and operations), particularly regarding problem areas that may require assistance from the Center, the NASA Engineering and Safety Center, or Headquarters

steps.label: Report system safety status to Center SMA Director
steps.action_object: system safety status to Center SMA Director

steps.label: Report problem areas requiring assistance
steps.action_object: problem areas requiring assistance from Center, NESC, or Headquarters

steps.label: Support OSMA requirements for audits

constraints.text: Support OSMA requirements for audits, assessments, and reviews

steps.label: Support OSMA requirements for assessments
Support OSMA requirements for reviews
